channel_news.summary: Amazon is hitting pause on a controversial change to its advertising payment system after backlash from sellers who said the update would disrupt cash flow and billing flexibility.

channel_news.summary: Travelpro, a brand long known for its durable luggage and loyal base of airline employees, is using a new marketing playbook as it tries to win over younger consumers.

channel_news.title: Lowe’s leans on its 35 million loyalty members as it expands into kids’ programs and subscriptions
channel_news.summary: Lowe’s is expanding its loyalty ecosystem to drive repeat visits and deeper customer relationships, adding kids' programs, subscriptions and viral products as consumers put off homebuying and other big-ticket purchases.

channel_news.title: Why brands can’t stop acting like reply guys and jumping into viral comment threads on social media
channel_news.summary: Brands are jumping into viral comment threads on TikTok, Instagram and X to generate real-time engagement. Not only is this an effective tactic to gain more likes and followers, but it can also help strike creator partnerships on the fly.

channel_news.title: AG1 lands in Target as its year of retail expansion continues
channel_news.summary: AG1's year of retail expansion continues. Months after launching in Costco and The Vitamin Shoppe, AG1 is announcing today that it is entering Target.

channel_news.title: Creator content has become critical for retail media networks
channel_news.summary: Two fast-growing advertising sectors -- retail media and the creator economy -- are increasingly becoming interlinked. Here's how more retail media networks are incorporating creator campaigns into their offerings.

channel_news.title: Candy brand Behave bet everything on TikTok Shop, went viral and secured a Target launch
channel_news.summary: After nearly going bankrupt in 2024, candy brand Behave lands on Target shelves this week. The company's founder credits TikTok Shop as a lifeline that helped save the business.

channel_news.title: Modern Retail Podcast: Has the latest sneaker bubble officially burst?
channel_news.summary: Allbirds' downward trajectory is indicative of how fierce the sneaker competition has become, as newer and legacy players vie for market share. This week's episode of the Modern Retail Podcast digs into the state of the sneaker market, looking at which players are up and which ones are down.
